credibilityCards.verifiedText: Safest externally quotable investment figure. Internal and illustrative rows are excluded.
credibilityCards.pendingText: Useful for coordination, but requires owner sign-off before executive publication.
credibilityCards.demoText: Do not quote as a real pipeline. These rows remain marked, searchable, and filterable.
credibilityCards.portfolioSub: {count} total rows · verified, pending, and demo values are separated below

credibility.label: Credibility rule:
credibility.text: headline investment totals separate verified public records, source-backed records pending owner review, and illustrative demo pipeline rows. Demo values illustrate the workflow but are not official pipeline totals.

filters.minValueAria: Minimum investment value in millions of dollars
filters.searchAria: Search investments by title or partner

privatization.emptyDescription: The platform is ready for a privatization pipeline, but no verified asset-level records are loaded yet. Required fields include asset name, sector, ownership status, transaction type, stage, timeline, government counterpart, value range, U.S. investor relevance, source IDs, risk level, and next step.
privatization.schemaFields: asset name · sector · owner/counterpart · transaction type · stage · value range · U.S. investor relevance · source IDs · risk · next action
privatization.safeState: Safe empty state: no company or asset names are invented. Add records only after owner approval and source IDs are available.

drawer.meaningDemo: This row should be used for workflow demonstration only until the responsible agency supplies a source-backed project record.
drawer.meaningVerified: This row can support executive briefing, while still retaining its source badge and as-of context.
drawer.meaningInternal: This row is useful for internal pipeline tracking, but should not be quoted publicly until owner review and source confirmation are complete.

status.operating: Capture aftercare needs, expansion signals, and measurable outcomes.
status.construction: Confirm implementation milestone, permits, financing, and delivery risks.
status.agreed: Turn agreement into an implementation owner, timetable, and source-backed milestone.
status.negotiation: Clarify decision maker, commercial terms, bottlenecks, and next meeting.
status.mou: Convert MoU into due-diligence pack, counterpart owner, and decision deadline.
status.paused: Document blocker, reactivation condition, and whether the row should remain visible.

blockers.ownerReview: Owner review required before external publication

usRelevance.confirm: U.S. company/investor fit requires owner confirmation.

publication.verified: Can support executive briefing when shown with source badge and as-of context.
publication.demo: Illustrative workflow row only; do not cite as a real project or official pipeline value.
publication.internal: Useful for internal coordination; owner review and source confirmation required before publication.

foreignAssistance.preliminaryNote: FY2025 bar is preliminary (partial reporting per ForeignAssistance.gov).
foreignAssistance.methodology: Methodology: total obligations basis (not net disbursements). Source: ForeignAssistance.gov country-page figures, cross-checked with the USAFacts aggregation. Yearly totals can shift by 5-10% as agencies revise prior-year reporting.
